title: trigonostemon zeylanicus
intro: Trigonostemon zeylanicus, also known as the Ceylonese trigonostemon or Ceylon trigonostemon, is a plant species native to Sri Lanka. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Trigonostemon zeylanicus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is traditionally prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and its leaves and roots are used in various herbal preparations to harness its medicinal properties.
